scripts.deploy: npm run build && cp package*.json dist && gcloud functions deploy decrypto-board-game-bot --gen2 --trigger-http --runtime nodejs20 --entry-point=main --allow-unauthenticated --region=europe-central2 --source=dist --update-build-env-vars="GOOGLE_NODE_RUN_SCRIPTS=" --project zinovik-project --set-secrets=TELEGRAM_TOKEN=decrypto-board-game-bot-telegram-token:latest,TOKEN=decrypto-board-game-bot-app-token:latest --service-account=decrypto-board-game-bot@zinovik-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com
